identity.name: Harry's Bar
identity.address: Via Vittorio Veneto, 150, 00187 Roma RM, Italy

discovery.text: Verified for Via Veneto: Harry's Bar remains a directly-on-the-boulevard café-bar with long hours and real sidewalk presence, useful for understanding how the street's hotel-and-bar rhythm turns a wide Roman avenue into a social promenade.

narrative.summary: A classic Via Veneto frontage where the boulevard still reads as café society, not just a traffic corridor.

blocks.title: Why it teaches the street
blocks.body: Jacobs cares about how a street invites lingering. Harry's Bar shows the mechanism on Via Veneto: generous frontage, hospitality spilling toward the sidewalk, and hours late enough to keep the avenue animated after daytime sightseeing ends.
